feat.name: Unbound Leaper
feat.text: Your jumping prowess is unmatched. You can Leap up to 30 feet in any direction without touching the ground and without requiring an Athletics check; when doing so, you must land on a space of solid ground within 30 feet of you, or else you fall after using your next action. You can exceed your normal Speed while Leaping.

traits.name: Tripkee
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tripkee ancestry. Tripkees are a family of froglike humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tripkees. An item with this trait is created and used by tripkees.

feat.special: If you have the Fantastic Leaps feat, the total distance you can Leap horizontally is 40 feet, and the total distance you can Leap vertically is 35 feet.
